attributes.description: Single-pod deep dive with memory decomposition, OOM risk thresholds, per-container resource breakdown, and network I/O.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.name), name = MAX(k8s.pod.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, name, CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " pods"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS name = MAX(k8s.pod.name)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.name), phase = MAX(k8s.pod.phase)
| EVAL phase = CASE(
    count > 1, "N/A",
    phase == 1, "Pending",
    phase == 2, "Running",
    phase == 3, "Succeeded",
    phase == 4, "Failed",
    "Unknown"
  )
| KEEP phase

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.name), phase = MAX(k8s.pod.phase)
| EVAL phase = CASE(
    count > 1, "N/A",
    phase == 1, "Pending",
    phase == 2, "Running",
    phase == 3, "Succeeded",
    phase == 4, "Failed",
    "Unknown"
  )
| KEEP phase

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS restarts = SUM(max_restarts)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| STATS restarts = SUM(max_restarts)

embeddableConfig.description: Total container restarts for this pod. MAX(k8s.container.restarts).

allColumns.label: View logs in Discover for pod:

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.pod.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.pod.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP utilization, max_val

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP utilization, max_val

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU usage` = SUM(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    `CPU requests` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_request),
    `CPU limits` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `CPU usage`, `CPU requests`, `CPU limits`

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU usage` = SUM(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    `CPU requests` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_request),
    `CPU limits` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `CPU usage`, `CPU requests`, `CPU limits`

embeddableConfig.description: CPU usage over time with request (dashed yellow) and limit (dashed red) reference lines.
embeddableConfig.title: CPU usage vs requests & limits

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = AVG(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP utilization, max_val

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS utilization = AVG(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization)
| EVAL max_val = 1.0
| KEEP utilization, max_val

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Memory working set` = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    `Memory requests` = SUM(k8s.container.memory_request),
    `Memory limits` = SUM(k8s.container.memory_limit)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Memory working set`, `Memory requests`, `Memory limits`

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Memory working set` = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    `Memory requests` = SUM(k8s.container.memory_request),
    `Memory limits` = SUM(k8s.container.memory_limit)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Memory working set`, `Memory requests`, `Memory limits`

embeddableConfig.description: Memory working set over time. Yellow dashed = requests, solid red = limits (OOMKill threshold).
embeddableConfig.title: Memory working set vs requests & limits

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.cpu_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_limit = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_cores = SUM(cpu_limit)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total_cores, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.cpu_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_limit = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_cores = SUM(cpu_limit)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total_cores, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS capacity = SUM(k8s.volume.capacity),
    available = SUM(k8s.volume.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL `Volume Usage` = capacity - available
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Volume Usage`

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS capacity = SUM(k8s.volume.capacity),
    available = SUM(k8s.volume.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL `Volume Usage` = capacity - available
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Volume Usage`

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL container_id = CONCAT(k8s.pod.name, "/", k8s.container.name)
| STATS `Container Count` = COUNT_DISTINCT(container_id)
    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Container Count`

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL container_id = CONCAT(k8s.pod.name, "/", k8s.container.name)
| STATS `Container Count` = COUNT_DISTINCT(container_id)
    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Container Count`

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL
| STATS avail = MAX(k8s.volume.available),
    cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.volume.name
| STATS total_avail = SUM(avail),
    total_cap = SUM(cap)
| EVAL utilization = ROUND(1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(total_avail) / TO_DOUBLE(total_cap), 4)
| KEEP utilization

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL
| STATS avail = MAX(k8s.volume.available),
    cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.volume.name
| STATS total_avail = SUM(avail),
    total_cap = SUM(cap)
| EVAL utilization = ROUND(1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(total_avail) / TO_DOUBLE(total_cap), 4)
| KEEP utilization

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.memory_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_limit = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_limit = SUM(mem_limit)
| KEEP total_limit

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.memory_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_limit = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
| STATS total_limit = SUM(mem_limit)
| KEEP total_limit

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.volume.name
| STATS total_cap = SUM(cap)
| KEEP total_cap

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.volume.name
| STATS total_cap = SUM(cap)
| KEEP total_cap

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    RSS = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.rss),
    `Working set` = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    Available = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, RSS, `Working set`, Available

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    RSS = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.rss),
    `Working set` = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    Available = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, RSS, `Working set`, Available

embeddableConfig.description: Memory composition over time. RSS, working set, and available memory as separate series. SUM per 1m bucket.
embeddableConfig.title: Memory composition

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.network.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    `Throughput` = SUM(RATE(k8s.pod.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, direction, `Throughput`

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.network.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    `Throughput` = SUM(RATE(k8s.pod.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, direction, `Throughput`

embeddableConfig.description: Network I/O over time. SUM(RATE(k8s.pod.network.io)) per 1m bucket.
embeddableConfig.title: Network I/O over time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    ready        = MAX(k8s.container.ready),
    restarts     = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    cpu_usage    = AVG(container.cpu.usage),
    memory_ws    = AVG(container.memory.working_set),
    cpu_limit    = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit),
    memory_limit = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
| EVAL
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0),
    mem_limit_util = CASE(
      memory_limit IS NOT NULL AND memory_limit > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(memory_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(memory_limit), 4),
      NULL)
| SORT restarts DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    ready        = MAX(k8s.container.ready),
    restarts     = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    cpu_usage    = AVG(container.cpu.usage),
    memory_ws    = AVG(container.memory.working_set),
    cpu_limit    = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit),
    memory_limit = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
| EVAL
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0),
    mem_limit_util = CASE(
      memory_limit IS NOT NULL AND memory_limit > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(memory_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(memory_limit), 4),
      NULL)
| SORT restarts DESC
| LIMIT 100

embeddableConfig.description: Container listing with ready status, restarts, CPU/memory usage, limits, and memory limit utilization.
embeddableConfig.title: Containers

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND container.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU usage` = AVG(container.cpu.usage)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.container.name
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.container.name, `CPU usage`

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND container.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU usage` = AVG(container.cpu.usage)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.container.name
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.container.name, `CPU usage`

embeddableConfig.description: CPU usage per container. avg(container.cpu.usage) broken down by k8s.container.name.
embeddableConfig.title: CPU usage by container
